text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I remember seeing her before. She's running in
today's race too, huh?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
She was great at the Asahi Hai F.S. I hope she
gives it her all today too!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
(More and more people are starting to recognize
me.)

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: No way, she's looking this way!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for eavesdropping, but what you said made
me happy.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I hope today becomes a beautiful memory for
you.

Cheering unlike any other echoes throughout the
paddock as the curtain rises on the Yayoi Sho!
